src: Constantly updated lists of world countries and their associated alpha-2, alpha-3 and numeric country codes as defined by the ISO 3166 standard, available in CSV, JSON , PHP, SQL and XML formats, in multiple languages and with national flags included; also available are the ISO 3166-2 codes of provinces/ states associated with the countries
ja: ISO 3166 規格に基づく世界の国々と、それに対応する alpha-2・alpha-3・数値の国コードを常時更新して提供。CSV・JSON・PHP・SQL・XML 形式対応、多言語対応、国旗付き。各国の ISO 3166-2 の州・省コードも収録。
